description_long: This is a compact submachine gun-style rifle with a metallic body and a matte black pistol grip. The upper receiver is constructed from metal, featuring a series of circular ventilation holes along the handguard for heat dissipation. The magazine is a long, rectangular, detachable box type, inserted vertically into the lower receiver. The barrel is short and robust, ending with a simple cylindrical muzzle device. Iron sights are mounted on the top, with a front post and a rear aperture for aiming. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal embellishments, making it suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, metallic submachine gun-style rifle with a black pistol grip, ventilated handguard, and a detachable box magazine. It features iron sights and a short barrel with a simple muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the ventilated handguard, pistol grip, magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle, front sight post, and the alignment of the handguard holes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the ejection port and magazine release more visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the rear sight aperture and the back of the receiver and magazine.
